summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new scheduling features: Date/Time picker, Auto-execute with APScheduler, and notification toggles. All features working correctly. Backend scheduler is running and auto-execution triggers at scheduled times.

issues: shadow* style props deprecated warning - should migrate to boxShadow
expo-av deprecation warning - should migrate to expo-audio/expo-video before SDK 54

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed HTTPException handling in delete_reminder and mark_reminder_executed endpoints - was incorrectly catching HTTPException and re-raising as 500
Auto-execute toggle correctly shows only for call/sms/whatsapp action types
Scheduler status properly exposed in health endpoint
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_* prefixed reminders during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scheduling features fully tested. Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_scheduling_features.py cover auto_execute, triggered reminders endpoint, and mark executed endpoint. APScheduler is running and auto-triggers reminders at scheduled time.

schedule_section.details: Schedule section displays current time correctly with 'Tap to change' hint

quick_presets.details: All 5 presets working: 'In 30 min', 'In 1 hour', 'In 2 hours', 'Tomorrow 9 AM', 'Tomorrow 6 PM'. Selected preset highlighted with accent color.

date_picker_modal.details: Modal opens with datetime-local input when clicking schedule card. Cancel and Confirm buttons work correctly.

auto_execute_toggle.details: Toggle visible for call/sms/whatsapp types. Correctly hidden for meet/deskwork/keepnotes. Dynamic hint shows action type (e.g., 'Automatically trigger call at scheduled time').

notify_me_toggle.details: Toggle visible on all action screens. Defaults to ON (blue). Schedules expo-notifications on mobile.

backend_scheduler.details: APScheduler running (verified via health endpoint). Jobs scheduled and executed correctly at scheduled time. Logs show successful auto-execution triggers.

api_triggered_reminders.details: GET /api/reminders/triggered returns list of reminders that were auto-triggered

api_mark_executed.details: PUT /api/reminders/{id}/executed marks reminder as completed and sets executed_at timestamp

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent: Fixed HTTPException handling in delete_reminder endpoint - now correctly returns 404 for non-existent reminders
Fixed HTTPException handling in mark_reminder_executed endpoint - now correctly returns 404 for non-existent reminders
